creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
The following ports are still depending on Django 1.11:

www/seahub
- www/py-django-constance
- www/py-django-jsonfield
- www/py-django-picklefield
- www/py-django-post_office
- www/py-django-ranged-response
- www/py-django-simple-captcha
- www/py-django-statici18n
- www/py-django-webpack-loader
- www/py-djangorestframework311

Status: Should be resolved once www/seahub gets updated to the 8.x release series.

www/py-django-mezzanine
- www/py-django-contrib-comments

Status: There's an alpha release for www/py-django-mezzanine with support for Django 2.2+ but it's not ready for production use, yet.
